response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. There is no recent C++ experience (last C/C++ work was a 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no exposure to capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domains. The skill stack is heavily web/backend (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than the C++/Windows/finance profile required.
strengths: Prior C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a developer tooling product
Strong overall engineering breadth with TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship practices
Solid communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: No recent C++ experience — last C/C++ role ended in 2015 (~10 years ago)
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; no Windows platform focus
Zero capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domain background

key_factors.factor: No fixed income / capital markets domain exposure
